What is Vantard?

Vantard is a Meme Index Fund. Our bespoke portfolio includes all of this cycle's top meme coins, and we're bringing eye-watering returns to the masses. No more trading in the trenches—invest in Vantard, and let your money work for you while you enjoy your life.
How To Buy
Connect your wallet and start buying!
1. Connect Your Personal Vantard Wallet
Everything is fully on-chain from day one. No paperwork, no KYC, just pure degenerate freedom. Don’t be a pussy. Buy now.
2. Select the Vantard Mutual Fund
A monthly rebalanced product featuring Solana's hottest tokens. We track all the greatest blue chips like WIF and Popcat.
3. Decide How Rich You Want to Be
Start investing from as little as $100 per month or a one-off lump sum. All major cryptocurrencies are accepted.
Redeeming Your Vantard Tokens
‘A lot of times people sell coins because they’re scared of making too much money.’ — Think about that for a second.
‘A lot of times people sell coins because they’re scared of making too much money.’ — Think about that for a second.
MIF Withdrawals
Like any good fund, VTARD lets you redeem your tokens against the underlying assets. Simply trade in your $VTARD via the dashboard and you can cash out your share of the meme coins in the basket. It’s that easy.
The Surge
All hail the Surge. It cuts the throat of fear and feeds the hunger of greed.

Vantard redemptions follow a surge pricing model (jeet tax) aimed to protect the fund and reward the big-balled winners riding to the top. The surge tax starts at 0% increasing to a maximum of 50% and only when demand is high. Protecting the chosen few depraved enough to ride to the top shall always be our priority. *You will always be able to freely trade the $VTARD token
Surge Fees
Fees from redemptions make you richer. Every time VTARD is traded in, it's burnt, driving up the token value. The fees collected from jeets? They’re reinvested right back into the fund, straight into the bags of every single one of you psychotic VTARD holders.
Surge Fees
Fees from redemptions make you richer. Every time VTARD is traded in, it's burnt, driving up the token value. The fees collected from jeets? They’re reinvested right back into the fund, straight into the bags of every single one of you psychotic VTARD holders.
